dataset.name: controlled_cache_probe
dataset.description: Controlled synthetic prompt-cache probe with stable long prefix

execution_profile.pairing_method: strict sort/group/round pair with equal first/second usage.prompt_tokens

reasoning_control.description: 请求显式指定 reasoning.effort=none，用于控制推理预算对 TTFT、端到端 E2E 时延和吞吐量的影响。
